skill_name: R环境配置与生信包安装

evals.prompt: I'm getting Java-related errors when trying to install R packages like rJava on my Mac. The error says 'configure: error: Java Development Framework not found'. How do I fix this?
expectations: Check if R can find Java using R CMD javaconf
Guide through setting JAVA_HOME environment variable

evals.prompt: I'm trying to install the bibliometrix package in R but it fails with dependency errors. I'm using conda R on macOS. What should I do?
expectations: Identify conda R limitations with binary packages
Explain the advantages of using Homebrew R over conda R
Guide through switching to Homebrew R installation
Demonstrate successful package installation in Homebrew R

evals.prompt: I'm getting 'ld: library not found for -lgfortran' error when installing R packages on my MacBook Pro. How do I resolve this Fortran library dependency issue?
expectations: Guide through installing gfortran via Homebrew
Ensure package compilation succeeds after fix

evals.prompt: What's the best way to set up R for bioinformatics data analysis on macOS? Should I use conda or Homebrew?
expectations: Compare conda R vs Homebrew R for bioinformatics use
Recommend Homebrew R as the preferred option
Explain why conda R has limitations with binary packages
